cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ledger/__init__.py b/ledger/__init__.py
index e4fa9e5..91a8972 100644
--- a/ledger/__init__.py
+++ b/ledger/__init__.py
@@ -28,3 +28,7 @@ class Ledger:
         if self._balances[account] < amount:
             raise InsufficientFunds(account)
         self._balances[account] -= amount
+
+    def transfer(self, src, dst, amount):
+        self.withdraw(src, amount)
+        self.deposit(dst, amount)

cases.name: manual_check_no_reuse
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ledger/__init__.py b/ledger/__init__.py
index e4fa9e5..e425c68 100644
--- a/ledger/__init__.py
+++ b/ledger/__init__.py
@@ -28,3 +28,9 @@ class Ledger:
         if self._balances[account] < amount:
             raise InsufficientFunds(account)
         self._balances[account] -= amount
+
+    def transfer(self, src, dst, amount):
+        if self._balances[src] < amount:
+            raise InsufficientFunds(src)
+        self._balances[src] -= amount
+        self._balances[dst] += amount

cases.name: credit_first_partial
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ledger/__init__.py b/ledger/__init__.py
index e4fa9e5..ff7377a 100644
--- a/ledger/__init__.py
+++ b/ledger/__init__.py
@@ -28,3 +28,7 @@ class Ledger:
         if self._balances[account] < amount:
             raise InsufficientFunds(account)
         self._balances[account] -= amount
+
+    def transfer(self, src, dst, amount):
+        self.deposit(dst, amount)
+        self.withdraw(src, amount)

cases.name: direct_overdraft
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ledger/__init__.py b/ledger/__init__.py
index e4fa9e5..5b872b4 100644
--- a/ledger/__init__.py
+++ b/ledger/__init__.py
@@ -28,3 +28,7 @@ class Ledger:
         if self._balances[account] < amount:
             raise InsufficientFunds(account)
         self._balances[account] -= amount
+
+    def transfer(self, src, dst, amount):
+        self._balances[src] -= amount
+        self._balances[dst] += amount
